objective: Add Left/Right arrow keyboard navigation on the design portfolio detail route (src/routes/portfolio/[slug]/+page.svelte): ArrowLeft goes to the previous portfolio entry, ArrowRight to the next, using the same order as getDesignPortfolio(). At the first entry, Left wraps to the last; at the last entry, Right wraps to the first. No visible hints or UI affordances. Include automated tests proving navigation targets and wrap behavior. ADR-002/003: enhancement-only (JS); baseline unchanged.

completed_stages.summary: Bootstrapped manifest and objective for portfolio slug keyboard cycling navigation.
Plan and acceptance criteria for load neighbors, optional util, and keyboard goto with editable guards.
Implemented neighbors in load, keyboard goto with wrap, util + load + browser tests; bits-ui stub for tests.
Test report maps AC-01-05, AC-07-14; AC-06 uncovered (no automated no-hint UI check).
PASS_WITH_NOTES: AC-06 partial (no automated no-hint UI test); ADR-002/003/007 met.
